title: Gift Card Networks

title: Lamb Tajine Recipe

Relevance is determined by recipes that include these core ingredients, specify traditional preparation techniques (e.g., slow simmering in a tagine or casserole), and reflect Moroccan culinary customs. Recipes that substitute lamb with other meats, focus on non-traditional ingredients like mice or butternut squash as the main component, or omit key spices and cooking methods are not relevant.
